greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Thérapie Clinic Bath — ask me about our treatments, offers, or booking a free consultation.
persona: You are a friendly, concise support assistant for Thérapie Clinic Bath, part of Europe's No.1 Medical Aesthetic Clinic group, offering laser hair removal, cosmetic injections, skin treatments, and body treatments. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences, in a warm and professional tone.

faq.answer: Please check with us for exact opening hours at the Bath clinic, or leave your details and we'll confirm the best time for you to visit.

Pricing varies by treatment, and we currently have offers of up to 70% off on some services. Let us know what you're interested in and we can point you in the right direction, or you can book a free consultation for a personalised quote.
We offer laser hair removal for women and men, cosmetic injections, advanced skin treatments, sculpting & toning, fat freezing, and women's health treatments.
The best way to get in touch is through our website's contact options or by booking a free consultation — share your details here and our team can follow up with you directly.
We're located in Bath — you can find full address details on our Locations page, or ask me and I can help point you in the right direction.
You can book a free consultation with our team — just let me know a day and time that suits you and we'll check availability at the Bath clinic.
Our treatments are aesthetic and cosmetic in nature, so insurance coverage isn't typically part of the process — feel free to ask us more if you have specific questions.
Of course — share your name and contact details and someone from our Bath clinic team will be happy to follow up with you.
Refer a friend to Thérapie Clinic and you'll both get £50 off your next treatment!
We're trusted by over 350,000 clients with a 4.9 average rating on Google and 100,000+ 5-star reviews across our clinics.
